basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has released the official notification for 2 Project Associate I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. or Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate Discipline with minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. M. Tech. in Water Resources Engineering is desirable.
qualification.details: Project Associate I: B.Tech./B.E. or Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate Discipline. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. M. Tech. in Water Resources Engineering is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar is June 8, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Project Associate I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech./B.E. or an equivalent professional qualification with at least 60% marks from graduation onwards. Additionally, 55% in 10th and 12th grades is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement for specific information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate I position will receive a monthly salary ranging from ₹45,000 to ₹70,000, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar must be submitted online through the official recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate I position is a temporary role with a duration of 6 months, as indicated in the salary details.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Gandhinagar require any specific experience for this role?
faq.answer: While a B.Tech./B.E. is required, the eligibility criteria also mention minimum percentage requirements from graduation, 10th, and 12th grades. Specific work experience is not detailed as a primary requirement.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Institute norms and Funding Agency norms. Further details regarding the selection stages will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply for the position?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. Please visit the provided links for detailed information and to submit your application.
